productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Striped Black & Blue T-shirt
description: Composition Black and blue striped polo T-shirt for men, made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, buttoned chest placket, vented hem and brand logo appliqued on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations indigo nation brings stylish stripes to your casual wardrobe with this fashionable T-shirt. The fabric will keep you fresh and comfortable all day, the ribbed sleeve hems sit snug on your well toned arms, while the vented hem offers a comfortable fit. Pair it with denims or corduroys and brown suede shoes for a relaxed, casual look. Model Statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
